entries.title: Lancer 3.2.6 + Feature Vote #1 results
body: Hey there! The first Patreon feature vote has ended, and there's a new update post on Lancer Automations and other modules.
Check out the recap and the new builds on the Patreon post.

entries.title: Patreon Feature Vote #1
body: First feature vote is up. Three options on the table: a Battle Log, an in-engine Automation Tutorial series, or 3D Terrain. Full breakdown of each on the Patreon post.
Voting open until June 15. Tier 1 to 3 patrons can vote.

entries.title: LaSossis Module V13 Migration
body: There is a lot of updates across all my modules. I recommend reading about it on the Patreon post, sorry it's a bit long.
Remember to make a backup. And... careful not to press the counter a second time. Would be nice not to mess up the number.
Anyway, more than 600 users now, that's damn huge. Thanks again.

Also, since there are starting to be a lot of you, I got curious. Where you play from, how you found this, how often, how big your table is, that kinda stuff. All optional, kinda like collectioning. Feel free to fill what you want, or not.

poll.title: Community check-in
poll.intro: All fields optional. One submission per install.

fields.name: discovery_source
fields.label: How did you discover the module?

fields.name: play_frequency
fields.label: How often do you play Lancer?

entries.title: Lancer System v13 is out, and i'm not on v13
body: Lancer System v13 is out, and i'm not on v13. All my personal setup and work environment is in v12. A lot of features lancer-automations (or my other modules) provide now exist natively in v13.

Moving to v13 is a humongous task, and i haven't had time to enjoy my own projects tbh (only got one game in). i need to gauge how important it is to people. Poll on my Patreon if you want to weigh in, or on Discord. Thanks.

entries.title: Grid Aware Auras 0.5.8.3 is out
body: Quick fix release on my Grid Aware Auras fork: auto-updates now stay on the fork. Hit update.

entries.title: Template Macro: full revamp
body: I just shipped a complete rewrite of my Template Macro module, bringing its architecture and UX in line with Grid Aware Auras and Terrain Height Tools. Details on the latest Patreon post.

entries.title: Where to reach me
body: Hi there. There are a lot of you using this module, but not a lot of bug reports or feature requests come back. Not that I'm wishing for more, I just want to make sure you know where to find me.
The most common spot is my channel on the Lancer Discord. If you support me on Patreon, you can DM me directly. There aren't that many of you yet, so it stays manageable.
